question: Does the image depict a top-down view of a maze structure?
Is the maze structured as a 20×20 grid (20 rows and 20 columns)?
Are the maze walls drawn with thick black lines and the paths shown as white corridors?
Is there an entrance at the bottom-left corner marked with a green arrow?
Is the entrance marker labeled with the text 'START'?
Is there an exit at the top-right corner marked with a red arrow?
Is the exit marker labeled with the text 'END'?
Is there a 2×2 central plaza visible in the center region of the maze?
Is there a ring-shaped corridor (closed loop) visible within the maze layout?
Is the correct path through the maze marked with a yellow dashed line?
Does the yellow dashed line logically connect the 'START' entrance to the 'END' exit?
Does the yellow dashed path stay within the white corridors and avoid crossing through the black walls?
Is there a coordinate grid drawn around the maze perimeter?
Are the row and column numbers on the coordinate grid labeled from 1 to 20?
Is there a legend displayed at the bottom of the image explaining the meaning of the symbols?
